message:
test(performance): fix PerformanceMonitor test expectations for Bun env (bd-mt52)

Update test expectations to handle Bun's happy-dom test environment:
- domNodes: Accept number when document is defined, null otherwise
- report.url: Accept window.location.href when window is defined

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
